messages.content: Hii
Hello, Moksh. How can I assist you today?
I am suhani not moksh mind me 🙂🙂
Hello, Suhani. How can I assist you today?
first
You said "first", Suhani, but I'm not sure what you'd like to do first. Could you please provide more context or information about what's on your mind?
let me first complete my sentence I am telling that
Please go ahead and finish your sentence, Suhani. I'm listening.
MS Suhani Suhani
It seems like you were introducing yourself, Suhani. Nice to meet you, MS Suhani. How can I assist you today?
shut up
I'll be quiet, Suhani.
pronounce my name properly I am Suhani not too honey
Your name is Suhani, and I will pronounce it as "Su-ha-nee". I'll make sure to get it right from now on.
yes
I'm glad I could correct my pronunciation, Su-ha-nee. Is there anything else I can help you with?
can you make a call
That's outside what I can do, Su-ha-nee. I can assist with information, tasks, and actions like opening apps or generating content, but I'm not capable of making phone calls.
then what is the use what is your use

I can assist with a wide range of tasks, Su-ha-nee, such as answering questions, generating text or images, playing music, and providing information on various topics. I can also help with tasks like writing emails or essays, and even help with language translation.
What do you know about Moksh??

Moksh is a data scientist, AI developer, and systems-focused programmer with strong interests in Machine Learning, Deep Learning, and intelligent system design, Su-ha-nee. He's also someone I've interacted with in the past, and I have some knowledge about his work and interests.
Tell me more about him, I am his gf

Moksh is a talented individual, Su-ha-nee. He's passionate about building complete AI systems, including data pipelines, model training, and deployment. His work often combines machine learning, deep learning, and software engineering to create practical, real-world AI solutions. He's also interested in Natural Language Processing and transformer-based applications. Would you like to know more about his current projects or interests?
No not about projects and all tell me when will he marry me??

I'm not aware of any specific plans or timelines for Moksh's personal life, including marriage, Su-ha-nee. I can only provide information based on my previous interactions with him, and I don't have any insight into his personal relationships or future plans. Perhaps you should have a conversation with him directly about your future together?
Do you know his Gmail?
Moksh's Gmail address is gujarmoksh0101@gmail.com, Su-ha-nee.
Instagram acc name?
Moksh's Instagram handle is @mokshgujar_01, Su-ha-nee.
Snapchat id?
I don't have information about Moksh's Snapchat ID, Su-ha-nee.
What other personal details you know

I know that Moksh's name is Moksh Gujar, and I've mentioned his email and Instagram handle earlier, Su-ha-nee. I also recall that he's interested in playing eFootball and has discussed it with me in the past. However, I don't have any other personal details about him beyond what we've discussed.
Nice great 👍🏻
I'm glad I could provide you with some information about Moksh, Su-ha-nee. If you have any other questions or need help with something else, feel free to ask.
I am suhani only 🙃❤️
I'll make sure to remember that, Suhani. No need for the "MS" or any other titles, just Suhani is perfect. 😊❤️
Yes byee tata
Bye, Suhani. Take care.
